positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical celestial gathering. The main subject is a central cluster of glowing, abstract constellations forming interlocking patterns, surrounded by stylized geometric elements like crescent moons, rings of planets, and comet trails. Use a deep indigo and cosmic teal color palette with highlights of electric gold and silver. The style should be modern tattoo flash combined with Art Nouveau symmetry, creating clean silhouettes and strong, graphic contrast. Ensure the composition is perfectly centered and highly repeatable, suitable for all-over garment printing. High contrast line work, vector art quality, minimal shading, bold outlines.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, debris, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, noisy, gradients, photorealism, realistic lighting, muted colors
